name: Death Delivery
short_description: You work as a delivery driver/package handler for "Fed-ups". You're loading the packages into your truck as usual when someone next to tells you, they're being stalked.
detailed_description:
Death Delivery
Death Delivery is a 40 minute - 1 hour long horror game where you deliver packages to doorsteps. However, it appears you're not alone.

Gameplay
This game is fundamentally a "Walking Simulator" with elements of driving (i.e the delivery truck.)

Key Features 
Take pictures of the packages to confirm delivery.

Ring doorbells to notify customers

Drive around in a "Fed-Ups" truck to deliver.

You're being stalked.  

Controls
W,A,S,D - Movement
E - Interact
Q - Drop Item
F - Toggle Phone
LMB - Take Picture
